steps.title: Use the replica clue
steps.content: The citadel includes a near replica of a famed Teotihuacan temple. That detail shows that portions of Tikal architecture share features with Teotihuacan architecture.

steps.title: Reject other relationships
steps.content: Choice A suggests improvement, which the text does not claim. Choice B suggests Tikal came before Teotihuacan architecture, reversing the evidence. Choice D suggests hostility, which is unrelated. The needed phrase means shared features or similarities. The answer is C.
